name: Spicy Corn Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Mix together dry ingredients: flour, corn meal, baking powder, sugar, and salt. In a separate bowl, combine corn, egg, and milk until just combined. Melt margarine in the hot oven-ready cast iron skillet or cake pan. Pour melted margarine into the batter and stir. Immediately pour into the hot skillet. Bake for 25 minutes.
